creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Works fine with current default python version - 3.7. Anyway, looking at traceback, it doesn't seems has anything to do with zim itself. It's gobject problem in interconnection with python 3.8. 

According to gobject changelog [1] they introduced some python 3.8 compatibility fixes in 3.30.5 and 3.32.2, while we now have version 3.28.3 in ports, that's obviously just doesn't support python 3.8. 

Meanwhile or run zim with python 3.7, or wait until newest devel/py-gobject3 lands the ports tree.

Now closing this PR, because it's not a zim bug. Feel free to open the new report against devel/py-gobject3 - because it's the real culprit.

[1] https://pygobject.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html#id5
